message:
chore(gitignore): ignore dist-dsr/ release-binary output directory

The dsr (Doodlestein Self-Releaser) workflow produces a dist-dsr/
directory containing pre-built cross-platform release binaries plus
their SHA256 sidecars (cass-memory-linux-x64, -macos-arm64, -macos-x64,
-windows-x64.exe; ~500 MB total). The directory is regenerated on every
release cut and never belongs in source control.

The adjacent `dist/` entry was already ignored; add `dist-dsr/` next to
it so the dsr output is treated the same way.
